---
name: Specification Clarification
description: Request clarification on specification language or behavior
title: "[CLARIFICATION] "
labels: ["question", "documentation"]
---

## Summary

A brief description of the unclear specification language or behavior.

## Specification Section

Which section(s) of the specification require clarification?

## Current Text

Quote the relevant specification text that is unclear.

## Ambiguity

Explain what makes the current text ambiguous or confusing. What are the possible interpretations?

## Proposed Clarification

Suggest clearer language or additional explanation if possible.

## Implementation Impact

How does this ambiguity affect implementers? Are there interoperability concerns?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information or references.
